text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has decided to run in the Arima
Kinen. Before the race, the caster takes a moment
to introduce all the Umamusume who will be
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Oguri Cap doesn't raise her head once during
the whole event. She has been out of sorts
recently and isn't running like herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her like this, Yaeno Muteki suddenly bolts
onto the track mid-event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The commotion draws Oguri Cap's attention, and
when she finally looks up, Yaeno gives her a stern
reminder that her fans are watching, and it is their
support that gives her power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno encourages her to lift her head, and with
these words, Oguri Cap's fighting spirit returns.
She appears reinvigorated.
